summary: Iteration 78 - Tested Supplier Payment Reminders feature: API endpoints (config CRUD, test endpoint, history), frontend page (thresholds, channel config, Test Now, history), and sidebar navigation. All 7 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly implements FIFO aging to identify overdue invoices
Reminder check groups alerts by supplier with severity levels (low/medium/high/critical)
History entries correctly store supplier_summary with name, outstanding, severity, invoices count
Scheduler runs daily at 9:00 AM via APScheduler CronTrigger
Email/WhatsApp integrations are real but may fail without SMTP/Twilio config (test endpoint still works)
Frontend data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Test Supplier data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Payment Reminders feature fully tested. Backend: GET /api/supplier-reminders/config returns config with default thresholds [30,60,90,120]. POST /api/supplier-reminders/config saves config. POST /api/supplier-reminders/test runs reminder check and returns supplier_summary. GET /api/supplier-reminders/history returns past reminders. Frontend: SupplierRemindersPage.jsx has enable toggle, threshold buttons (30/60/90/120/150/180), time picker, email/WhatsApp channel toggles with recipient management, Test Now and Save Settings buttons, and reminder history section. Sidebar shows 'Payment Reminders' link under Finance section. Test Supplier has SAR 690 outstanding at 30+ days (medium severity).

get_config.returns: Default config with thresholds [30,60,90,120], email_enabled, whatsapp_enabled, recipients lists

save_config.verifies: Config persists and can be retrieved

test_reminder.test_result: 1 supplier (Test Supplier) with SAR 690 at medium severity

get_history.returns: List of past reminder entries with sent_at, alerts_count, suppliers_count, supplier_summary

frontend_ui.history_section: data-testid='reminder-history' - Shows past reminders with supplier details

sidebar_navigation.status: WORKING - Link visible and navigates correctly

mocked_apis.email_sending: Real integration - requires SMTP config in email_settings collection
mocked_apis.whatsapp_sending: Real integration - requires Twilio config in whatsapp_config collection
mocked_apis.note: Test endpoint works and creates history even if email/whatsapp fail
